productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Cfc H Sho Blue Shorts
description: Composition Royal blue shorts made of 100% polyester Climacool fabric, with an elasticated waistband that has a drawstring on the inside, white stripe panels on the side seams, mock mesh hems, appliqued Chelsea team badge towards the right leg hem and brand name embroidered on the back, near the left leg Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash dark colours separately inside out Do not use fabric softeners Do not soak or bleach Do not tumble dry Dry in shade Iron inside out Do not iron on print/trims/logo Made of ClimaCool fabric, these adidas shorts are ideal for all Chelsea fans and football fanatics alike. While the soft and broad elastic waistband sits snugly, the drawstrings on the inside allow you to create a customized Fit. The ClimaCool fabric wicks sweat away from your body to keep you cool and fresh all day. Pair it with Sports t-shirts and performance shoes for an extended training session. Model statistics The model wears trousers, length of 41.5" Height-6.1", Waist-31"
